name: NewsAPI
description: Search millions of news articles from thousands of sources worldwide. Great for competitive intelligence, market research, and staying on top of industry news.

auth.hint: Sign up for a free API key at newsapi.org. The free tier supports 100 requests/day.

tools.name: get_top_headlines
tools.description: Get the latest top headlines by country, category, or keyword.

params.name: country
params.description: 2-letter ISO country code, e.g. us, br, gb, fr, de

params.name: category
params.description: News category: business, entertainment, health, science, sports, technology

tools.name: search_news
tools.description: Search all news articles by keyword, source, date range, and language.

params.name: q
params.description: Search query — supports AND, OR, NOT and exact phrases in quotes

params.name: language
params.description: Language code: en, pt, es, fr, de, it, nl, no, ru, se, ud, zh

params.name: sortBy
params.description: Sort by: relevancy, popularity, or publishedAt

tools.name: get_sources
tools.description: Get the list of news sources available, filterable by category, language, and country.

params.name: category
params.description: Category: business, entertainment, health, science, sports, technology

params.name: language
params.description: Language code: en, pt, es, fr, de
